in_tree_third_party.name: target Python sysroot subset
in_tree_third_party.notes: Repository-local minimal Python 3.11 target sysroot subset used for cross-building the extension; excluded from public source archives

in_tree_third_party.name: OpenCV prebuilt subset
in_tree_third_party.notes: Repository-local RV1106 OpenCV subset used to avoid rebuilding OpenCV in CI; excluded from public source archives

project_owned_replacements.name: DMA allocator replacement
project_owned_replacements.notes: Project-owned replacement for earlier SDK-derived DMA helper code

project_owned_replacements.name: IVE memory helper replacement
project_owned_replacements.notes: Project-owned replacement for earlier SDK-derived IVE memory/sample helpers

project_owned_replacements.name: Internal C compatibility helpers
project_owned_replacements.notes: Project-owned internal helpers used by bundled third-party C sources

external_build_only.name: Luckfox/Rockchip SDK headers and runtime libraries
external_build_only.notes: Build-time only; keep out of the public source archive and keep staged vendor libraries out of release assets

external_build_only.name: RKNN Toolkit2 headers and runtime libraries
external_build_only.notes: Treat as distribution-sensitive unless you have explicit redistribution confirmation

external_build_only.name: librga headers and runtime libraries
external_build_only.notes: Fetched/staged externally; the staged libraries are not published with VisionG release assets

external_build_only.name: IVE headers and runtime libraries
external_build_only.notes: Fetched/staged externally; the staged libraries are not published with VisionG release assets

external_build_only.name: optional OpenCV source archive for local regeneration
external_build_only.notes: Kept only as an optional local regeneration path; CI and releases use the repository-local OpenCV subset and the public source archive does not ship staged OpenCV build outputs
